name: Serval
desc: A Belobog mechanic who used to be a researcher for the Technology Division of the Architects.\nAs Gepard Landau's elder sister, her personality stands in stark contrast to her brother's.\nShe loves an ancient form of music known as "rock 'n' roll" that was popular before the Eternal Freeze.

1.name: Echo Chamber
1.desc: Basic ATK deals Lightning DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Basic ATK DMG to a random target adjacent to the target enemy.

2.name: Encore!
2.desc: Every time Serval's Talent is triggered to deal <u>Additional DMG</u>, she regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

3.name: Listen, the Heartbeat of the Gears
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Make Some Noise!
4.desc: Ultimate has a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to apply Shock to any enemies not currently Shocked. This Shock has the same effects as the one applied by Skill.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

5.name: Belobog's Loudest Roar!
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: This Song Rocks to Heaven!
6.desc: Serval deals <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG to Shocked enemies.

110301.name: Roaring Thunderclap
110301.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Serval's ATK to one designated enemy.
110301.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to one enemy.

110302.name: Lightning Flash
110302.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Serval's ATK to one designated enemy and Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Serval's ATK to enemies adjacent to it, with a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> for enemies hit to become Shocked for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhile Shocked, enemies take Lightning DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Serval's ATK at the beginning of each turn.
110302.simple_desc: Deals Lightning DMG to one enemy and minor Lightning DMG to adjacent targets, with a high chance of <color=#f29e38ff>applying Shock</color> on the target.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

110303.name: Here Comes the Mechanical Fever
110303.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Serval's ATK to all enemies. Enemies already Shocked will extend the duration of their Shock state by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
110303.simple_desc: Deals Lightning DMG to all enemies and increases the duration of Shock.

110304.name: Galvanic Chords
110304.desc: After Serval attacks, deals Lightning <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Serval's ATK to all Shocked enemies.
110304.simple_desc: After attacking, deals <color=#f29e38ff>a minor amount of <u>Additional DMG</u></color> to all Shocked enemies.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

110306.name: Attack
110306.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

110307.name: Good Night, Belobog
110307.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals Lightning DMG equal to <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of Serval's ATK to a random enemy, with a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> for all enemies to become Shocked for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhile Shocked, enemies will take Lightning DoT equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Serval's ATK at the beginning of each turn.
110307.simple_desc: Attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals minor Lightning DMG to a random single enemy, with a high chance to <color=#f29e38ff>Shock</color> all enemy targets.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: When using skill, increases the <u>base chance</u> for the attacked enemy target to become Shocked by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: At the start of the battle, immediately regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.
Upon defeating an enemy, ATK is increased by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
